working_on.notes: App running successfully at http://localhost:34115. Metadata editor modal fully functional with confirmation dialog.

pending_tasks.task: End-to-end testing with real MP3/FLAC files
pending_tasks.notes: Verify metadata changes persist after app restart
Future enhancement - edit multiple tracks at once

recent_changes.description: Thêm tính năng chỉnh sửa Metadata thủ công và cập nhật UI
Updated README.md with Metadata Editor features
Fixed TypeScript type mismatch in handleAutoTagAll

errors_encountered.error: TypeScript type mismatch: Track[] vs TrackMetadata[]
errors_encountered.solution: Added .map() to ensure optional fields have default empty string values
Installed flacvorbis package and updated metadata_writer.go to use correct API

decisions_made.decision: Use flacvorbis package for FLAC metadata handling
decisions_made.reason: Simpler API than raw go-flac for Vorbis comment manipulation

decisions_made.decision: Make Title field required, others optional
decisions_made.reason: Ensures every track has a name; other metadata can be added incrementally

decisions_made.decision: Add confirmation dialog before saving metadata
decisions_made.reason: Prevents accidental overwrites of file metadata

git_status.last_commit_message: Thêm tính năng chỉnh sửa Metadata thủ công và cập nhật UI
